prompt_text: Create a structured daily routine for health.
response_text:
# Daily Health Routine

## Morning (6-8 AM)
- **Wake up** at consistent time
- Drink 16-20 oz water
- 10-minute stretching or light yoga
- Healthy breakfast (protein + whole grains + fruit)
- Take vitamins/supplements
- 5-minute meditation or breathing exercise

## Mid-Morning (10-11 AM)
- Hydrate (water or herbal tea)
- Short walk or movement break (5-10 min)
- Healthy snack if needed

## Afternoon (12-1 PM)
- **Lunch** with balanced nutrients
- 20-30 minute walk or exercise
- Drink water

## Late Afternoon (3-4 PM)
- Hydrate
- Healthy snack (nuts, fruit, yogurt)
- Stress-relief activity (walk, music, hobby)

## Evening (6-8 PM)
- **Dinner** 2-3 hours before bed
- Gentle movement (walk, yoga, stretching)
- Limit screen time 1 hour before bed

## Before Bed (8-10 PM)
- Relaxation routine (reading, journaling, meditation)
- Prepare sleep environment (cool, dark, quiet)
- Consistent bedtime
- 7-9 hours sleep target

## Daily Goals
- ✓ 8+ glasses of water
- ✓ 30+ minutes movement
- ✓ Balanced meals
- ✓ Stress management
- ✓ Quality sleep

**Adjust timing to fit your schedule while maintaining consistency.**
